cta.description: No jargon. No fluff. Just a conversation about what you need and how we make it happen.

Footer.brandDescription: We build what others prototype. Exceptional digital products for businesses that demand more.

Metadata.siteTitle: XCLER - Web Development and Automation Agency Germany
Metadata.siteDescription: XCLER builds high-performance websites, apps, and workflow automation systems for businesses in Germany and across Europe, with a focus on efficiency, precision, and scalable growth.
Metadata.pageTitle: XCLER — Web Development & AI Automation Agency
Metadata.pageDescription: XCLER builds high-performance websites, apps, and AI automation systems for businesses in Germany and across Europe.
Metadata.homeDescription: XCLER delivers custom web development, app development, Shopify and WordPress solutions, plus AI automation for businesses ready to scale.

Hero.title: Web development and AI automation for measurable business growth.
Hero.subtitle: We build websites, apps, and AI systems with precision, efficiency, and scale at the core.
Hero.description: A focused team for web development and automation. We turn business goals into digital products with measurable outcomes. Efficiency in delivery. Precision in execution. Built for scale.

service1.title: Web Development
service1.description: Custom websites built with Next.js, React, and modern frameworks. Fast, responsive, and SEO-optimized for visibility, performance, and conversion.

service2.title: App Development
service2.description: Cross-platform and native applications, from MVP to scalable product. Clean architecture, precise UX, and production-ready engineering.

service3.title: WordPress & Shopify
service3.description: E-commerce stores and content websites built for conversion. Custom themes, targeted integrations, and performance optimization for sustainable scale.

service4.title: Workflow Automation
service4.description: Reduce repetitive work, connect your tools, and reclaim execution time. We build automation workflows for operational efficiency, precision, and reliable scaling.

service5.title: AI Chatbots & Agents
service5.description: Intelligent chatbots and AI agents for support, lead qualification, and sales. RAG-powered, context-aware, and designed for precise 24/7 customer interactions.

About.introDescription: We are not a 200-person agency with layers of management. We are three specialists focused on digital systems that deliver measurable value. When you work with XCLER, you work directly with the people building and scaling your product.
About.ctaHeading: Ready for your next scaling step?
About.ctaDescription: We work with ambitious teams and clear business goals. If you are planning a high-impact digital project, let us talk.

member1.expertise: Workflow Automation • AI Agents • RAG Systems
member1.tools: Make.com, n8n, Zapier, GoHighLevel, AI Call Agents
member1.bio: 3+ years transforming manual operations into scalable automation systems, with a focus on efficiency, precision, and measurable business value.

member2.expertise: Web & App Development • API Architecture • CI/CD
member2.tools: Next.js, React, Python, FastAPI, Flask, Docker
member2.bio: Builds web and mobile applications designed for speed, maintainability, and scale. Clean architecture and production-grade code are non-negotiable.

member3.bio: Specializes in CMS and e-commerce solutions teams can manage with confidence, combining conversion logic, technical precision, and organic visibility.

value1.title: Clarity
value1.description: We communicate directly and realistically. If a project takes 4 weeks, we say 4 weeks, not 2 to close a deal.

value2.title: Business Focus
value2.description: Your business goals drive every decision. We do not build what is trendy. We build what performs.

value3.title: Operational Efficiency
value3.description: A focused team means less friction. Direct communication, fast delivery, and reliable execution.

value4.title: Sustainable Scaling
value4.description: Our work does not end at launch. We support ongoing optimization, performance, and long-term product scaling.

Pricing.introDescription: Every project is different. These packages are starting points. You receive a precise quote after a focused requirements review.
Pricing.bottomCtaSuffix: and get a clear recommendation in minutes.

package1.name: Starter
package1.description: Ideal for businesses that need a professional online presence quickly.

package2.name: Professional
package2.description: For businesses building a complete digital presence and preparing for scale.

features.feature1: Multi-page custom website or web app

package3.name: Enterprise
package3.description: Full digital ecosystems for businesses that require precision, reliability, and enterprise-grade scale.
